name: Diet Cream Soup Base
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is suitable for anyone who needs to know the exact contents of soup.
Other options: Regular recipes use about 1 1/2 tablespoons butter and 1 1/2 tablespoons flour per cup of milk for a medium white sauce.
1. Combine evaporated milk, water, and cornstarch in a saucepan.
2. Mix soy milk with corn starch in a separate bowl.
3. Stir skim milk with vegetable oil and additional cornstarch in another bowl.
4. Whisk dry ingredients into cold milk until well combined.
5. Blend all components either in a blender or jar.
6. Heat the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly, until it thickens and simmers.
7. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
8. If using fresh tomatoes, cook them with onion and seasoning, let cool, then puree in a blender.
9. Combine the tomato sauce with the white sauce gradually, ensuring both are at the same temperature to prevent curdling.
10. Heat the soup until it is hot enough to serve but do not allow it to boil.
11. Use about 2 cups of prepared broth for serving.
Suggested vegetables: Potato with a small amount of onion, carrot, zucchini, cabbage with ham or sauteed onions, mushroom, broccoli. Season as desired.
Tested Dec 93 using powdered milk and thawed canned tomatoes by Elizabeth Rodier. This was a successful experiment based on a combination of recipes from several different sources.
